title: The Ulti Modpack Unbound
description: This is a mod pack based on the Ulti Mod pack, but rather then living through the lives of monsters it is more adventure and survival oriented.
body:
In this mod pack I have tailored a custom sky block world with a tiny puzzle to solve! If you can survive and solve the puzzle you get access to the whole world! You can choose whether to try it or not, but it will show off some of the exclusive mods in the mod pack off.

You can explore in the better nether and better ends! With scaling difficulty this will surely be a mod pack for those who seek a difficult challenge and for those who hunger for a dynamic learning curve for fighting!

You can play on vanilla server with this mod pack which is what I’d hope happened with the ulti mod pack, but this one as long as the server allows minimal mod you can play it!

Thanks to the creator of the Alive Dynamic Ecosystems mod over at curse forge! https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alive-dynamic-ecosystems-plants
